title: Tommy Brackens
summary: Published profile of Tommy “The Human Dragster” Brackens, covering his motocross-to-BMX transition, professional career, NORA Cup and Brackens Racing Products.
qualification_notes: The source lists Powerlite Racing under 1991 despite also stating retirement in 1990; both are preserved as published without silent correction.
The source’s opening character summary is explicitly marked as Copilot-generated and is not treated as archive verification.
